warnings: This 'architectural' fence sheet (A-14) actually carries small structural rebar/pile-foundation detail for the property boundary fence (column C1, tie beam GB, piles) rather than pure finishes — captured with whatever material/rebar fields the actual detail calls for, per the schema's 'section' pattern guidance for non-primary-structure details.

Tie-beam rebar callout ('2-ø9 STR:ø6@150' plus '2-ø9+1ø9 BENT L/5') and the foundation depth breakdown are small, dense text; read with medium confidence and flagged for zoom review rather than treated as certain.

This fence structure (posts + tie beam + piles) is a separate, independent foundation system from the main house and is NOT tied to the main building's grid (1,2,3/A,B,C,D) — no grid_source reference included.
Sibling fence type (แบบขยายรั้วแบบที่ 2) is on the next page — see _หน้า17.json.
